quests.summary: Main-quest Act 0 spine: siege of Calrenoth, drawbridge retreat, Creotar vision. Dialogue imported from Twine Harlowe source.
quests.starts: Campaign start / character creation exit into Act 0 tutorial.

objectives.summary: Meet Arkand at the siege and learn the keep is under attack.
Reach Calrenoth and report to Commander Grenge.
Secure Larrell’s rear drawbridge and signal the retreat.
Survive the Realm of Darkness vision and wake toward the next hub.

forks.summary: Stay to help Larrell vs flee immediately — Twine branches into the Creotar segment.

openQuestions: Whether Creotar destroy-Shroud guidance is honest or Frangitur irony
Crystal location stubs empty in Twine
Ledgeport world coords + ferry to Cristallo; DEC-0032 wake reconcile (Dom D-P0-09/10)

quests.summary: Help Guard Pellin pinned under an overturned supply cart near the Ledgeport farmland road.
quests.starts: After Ledgeport unlock; farmland road east of Ledgeport. Arkand in party or available at camp.

objectives.summary: Find Guard Pellin pinned under an overturned supply cart.
Lift cart (strength check or lever props).

forks.summary: Help gladly vs mock him / make Arkand do it (dialogue tone).

openQuestions: Exact farmland road POI name when map naming lands
Dialogue trees not authored yet (main quest uses Twine Act 0)

quests.summary: Repay a signal-fire debt on a border ridge; consequential fork seeds Act 2 allegiance pressure.
quests.starts: Border ridge soft-opens after early Act 1 patrol beat (exact beat TBD).

objectives.summary: Reach the unpaid signal-fire post on the border ridge.
Choose how to resolve the debt (fuel, coin, or force).

forks.summary: Pay/fuel aid vs seize the post — flags feed later allegiance.

openQuestions: Precise Act 1 unlock beat and watch faction id when authored
Dialogue trees not authored yet (main quest uses Twine Act 0)
